description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in a stylized military-inspired uniform, featuring a fitted brown jacket with insignia patches on the shoulders and a large emblem on the back. He wears a dark shirt underneath, a harness system with straps around the thighs and waist, and tight pants tucked into tall, knee-high boots. The figure has a full beard and mustache, with medium-length hair swept back. His arms are extended horizontally, and his facial expression is stern and focused. The overall appearance suggests a character from a regimented or combat-oriented organization, suitable for urban or action-themed environments.
description: A bearded adult male in a military-style uniform with a brown jacket, harness, and tall boots, arms extended horizontally. Distinctive insignia and harness details evoke a disciplined, action-ready presence.
description_view_0: Front view shows the facial features, brown jacket with open front, harness straps, and boots clearly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the thickness of the jacket, and the layered harness system.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the large emblem on the back of the jacket, the harness arrangement, and the back of the boots.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, jacket sleeve, and harness details.
attribute_clothing_type: military-style uniform with fitted jacket, harness straps, and tall boots
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
attribute_hairstyle: medium-length hair swept back with full beard and mustache
